subcodes.title: Words to some Indians, spoken on 1912-10-11(?)
subcodes.first_line: Prophets do not comprehend the God Essence. To comprehend the Sun of Reality we would have to be greater (than the Sun)... The Mirror of the Prophet cannot expand sufficiently to comprehend the Infinite.
subcodes.subjects: @inability of the Manifestation; Prophet to comprehend God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @Manifestation of God as sun
